name: SHL Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ)
description: Our occupational personality questionnaire helps you to get accurate, bias-free assessments by matching individual working preferences to business requirements.
hero_text: Get accurate, Insightful assessments of potential by matching individual working preferences directly to business requirements.

name: Global Skills Assessment
description: SHL's Global Skills Assessment measures 96 behavioral skills in 15 minutes. Objective data for onboarding, upskilling, reskilling, and workforce planning.
source_title: Global Skills Assessment | Measure 96 Workplace Skills
faq_questions: We already have our own competency framework. Why would we use the SHL Universal Competency Framework (UCF)?
How does this help with upskilling and reskilling?
How does skills data from hiring get used later in development or mobility?
Is there evidence the GSA predicts performance?
What does "globally normed" mean for my organization?

name: SHL Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Build an engaged, high-performing workforce using our motivation questionnaire (MQ) by matching individual employee motivation to team and organizational goals.
hero_text: Build an engaged, high-performing workforce using our motivation questionnaire (MQ) by matching individual employee motivation to team and organizational goals.

name: Situation Judgement Tests (SJT)
description: Using our Situational Judgment Tests (SJT), you can measure candidates' behavioral fit to a given role by assessing their response to a specific work situation.
hero_text: Using our Situational Judgment Tests (SJT), you can measure candidates' behavioral fit to a given role by assessing their response to a specific work situation.

name: Call Center Simulations
description: SHL’s Call Center Simulations and assessment tool helps you to identify agents with the critical competencies and personality in a real-life call center environment.
source_title: Virtual Call Center Simulation and Assessment Software
hero_text: SHL’s Call Center Simulations and assessment tool helps you to identify agents with the critical competencies and personality in a real-life call center environment.

name: Business Skills
description: With our computer literacy test, assess candidates' Microsoft Office proficiency, such as working with graphs and charts, creating presentations, and more.
source_title: Business Skills Assessment Test | Computer Literacy Test
hero_text: With our computer literacy test, assess candidates' Microsoft Office proficiency, such as working with graphs and charts, creating presentations, and more.

name: Coding Simulations
description: Shortlist 45% more candidates within half the usual hiring time with our coding skills assessment for full stack, data engineering, front-end and more roles.
hero_text: Shortlist 45% more candidates within half the usual hiring time with our coding skills assessment for full stack, data engineering, front-end and more roles.

name: Technical Skills
description: SHL Technical Skills assessment helps you to measure knowledge of 180+ technology concepts in less than 15 minutes for Full Stack, Front-end, Data Science, DevOps, and more roles.
source_title: Technical Skill Assessment | Assess Technical Knowledge
hero_text: SHL Technical Skills assessment helps you to measure knowledge of 180+ technology concepts in less than 15 minutes for Full Stack, Front-end, Data Science, DevOps, and more roles.

name: Realistic Job and Culture Previews (RJP)
description: With our Realistic Job Previews, candidates can self-assess their fit with the role and with your company through a set of tasks and culture-based questions.
aliases: realistic job and culture previews rjp
hero_text: With our Realistic Job Previews, candidates can self-assess their fit with the role and with your company through a set of tasks and culture-based questions.

name: SVAR
description: SHL SVAR is a spoken language assessment that uses AI-driven scoring to deliver fast, consistent results for hiring at scale.
source_title: SHL SVAR | Spoken Language Assessment for Hiring
hero_text: Assess genuine language skills across speaking, vocabulary, grammar, listening and comprehension — giving you a reliable signal you can trust in high-volume hiring.
